mapper.select: SELECT id, login_id, email, password, name, phone, role, status, last_login_at, password_changed_at, created_at FROM users WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, login_id, email, name, phone, role, status, created_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (login_id, password, role, status, name, phone, email) VALUES (#{loginId}, #{password}, #{role}, #{status}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{email}) RETURNING id, login_id, email, name, phone, role, status, created_at
INSERT INTO user_refresh_tokens (user_id, token_hash, family_id, expires_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tokenHash}, #{familyId}::uuid, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT rt.id, rt.user_id, rt.token_hash, rt.family_id, rt.expires_at, rt.revoked_at, rt.created_at, u.login_id, u.name, u.role, u.status FROM user_refresh_tokens rt JOIN users u ON u.id = rt.user_id AND u.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE rt.token_hash = #{tokenHash}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_refresh_tokens SET revoked_at = NOW() WHERE family_id = #{familyId}::uuid AND revoked_at IS NULL
UPDATE user_refresh_tokens SET revoked_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked_at IS NULL
